'''''Limnate''''' was a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] in service with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was present at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
